task: READ-ONLY audit of every Quickshell central-widget transition. Inspect home_manager/hyprland/quickshell/top-bar/Bar.qml, StatusData.qml, and central components. Widgets: workspaces, volume, brightness, media, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, updates, launcher. Check pairwise state exclusivity, timer cleanup, focus/target monitor, geometry/content behavior during tall↔short and same-size transitions, and interrupted transitions after the recent removal of bounce. Identify only concrete bugs or edge cases with file:line references and smallest fixes. Do not edit files. Be concise.

criteria.must: Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable
Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable

criteriaSatisfied.evidence: Six concrete medium-severity findings cite Bar.qml and StatusData.qml line ranges and include minimal fixes.

commandsRun.command: git status --short; git log; git diff; git diff --cached
commandsRun.summary: Inspected current, staged, and unstaged transition-related changes.

commandsRun.command: nl -ba audited QML files; grep for animations, timers, callLater, and visibility mutations
commandsRun.summary: Verified line references, state transitions, cleanup paths, and removal of bounce constructs.

validationOutput: No OutBack, SpringAnimation, overshoot, or bounce constructs found in audited central widgets.
Static audit found tall-to-short alignment, cleanup, deferred scan, Bluetooth action, and monitor-target edge cases.
residualRisks: No live frame-by-frame transition validation was run.
Monitor hotplug and real asynchronous Wi-Fi/Bluetooth completion behavior remain untested.
childReport.diffSummary: Read-only audit; no files changed. Repository already contained staged and unstaged work.
reviewFindings: medium: Bar.qml:235-287 - incoming short content vertically follows the still-tall container during tall-to-short transitions.
medium: StatusData.qml:465-466,563-564,578-579,704-705,893-894 - cross-widget transitions bypass full Wi-Fi cleanup.
medium: StatusData.qml:684-691 - deferred Wi-Fi scan can restart after selector closure.
medium: StatusData.qml:721-725,784-800,1072-1075 - hidden Bluetooth action timer/state persists and blocks reuse.
medium: Bar.qml:134-153; StatusData.qml:609-610,712-713,901-902 - clicked monitor is not propagated for Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or updates.
childReport.manualNotes: Static read-only review only; pre-existing staged files were not modified.
